title: Duel expiry cron
description: Create a scheduled task that runs every 30s, finds expired open duels, refunds creator's bet, marks as cancelled. Add POST /api/v1/duels/expire endpoint.
result: Backend: added expireOld, getStats, getLeaderboard + routes

title: Player duel stats endpoint
description: Add GET /api/v1/players/:id/duel-stats endpoint returning totalDuels, wins, losses, ties, biggestWin, totalWagered, winRate.
result: Backend: added expireOld, getStats, getLeaderboard + routes

title: Duel leaderboard endpoint
description: Add GET /api/v1/leaderboard/duels returning top 20 by winRate (min 5 duels).
result: Backend: added expireOld, getStats, getLeaderboard + routes

title: Duel Arena — status banner + player cards
description: Animated status banner with icons, player avatars with pulse animation on their turn, VS divider with glow effect.
result: Frontend: animations, confetti, tabs, cards, player profile

title: Duel Arena — slot reels animation
description: CSS animation for reel spinning (slot machine effect), winner highlight (gold), loser dimmed, confetti on win.
result: Frontend: animations, confetti, tabs, cards, player profile

title: Duel Lobby — cards + create form
description: Card redesign with mini-preview, bet presets (100/500/1000/5000), active duel counter.
result: Frontend: animations, confetti, tabs, cards, player profile

title: Duel Lobby — tabs
description: Tab navigation: Open | My Duels | History. History shows settled/cancelled duels.
result: Frontend: animations, confetti, tabs, cards, player profile

title: Player Profile page
description: New page with win/loss progress bar, recent duels list, total won/lost.
result: Frontend: animations, confetti, tabs, cards, player profile

title: Player duel stats API integration
description: Connect Player Profile to backend stats endpoint, add route in App.tsx.
result: Frontend: animations, confetti, tabs, cards, player profile

title: Tests: duel expiry
description: Write test: create open duel, wait/trigger expiry, verify refund.

title: Tests: duel settlement + leaderboard
description: Write test: both spin -> verify payout. Write test: 5+ duels -> verify leaderboard.
